description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to test with multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8), PyTorch versions (1.4.0+cpu, 1.5.1+cpu, 1.6.0+cpu, 1.7.1+cpu) on ubuntu-latest. Check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements-dev.txt and requirements.txt, install PyTorch and skorch, and run tests with pytest.
